dataHero.title: PQRSF
dataHero.subtitle: At Heinsohn, we value your opinion
dataHero.description:
We love knowing your perception of our services to continue improving every day.

If you want to send us a petition, complaint, claim, suggestion, or congratulation, we will show you how to do it:

cards.title: Send your request
cards.description: Send your message to the email pqrsf@heinsohn.com.co. There you can share your comments, requests, or suggestions with us directly and easily.

cards.title: Attach necessary information
cards.description: Include the documents or data that support your request. By sending them, you will be authorizing our personal data protection policy, which guarantees the safe handling of your information.

cards.title: Indicate the type of request
cards.description: In the subject of the email, mention whether it is a petition, complaint, claim, suggestion, or congratulation. This will help us identify your request and provide you with a faster response.
